messages.text: Gents, todays call is just the board, so Chris Eric and me. Thanks

<@U012MBNJ67K> Have you had the accounting firm document an updated indirect rate for Soylei? Currently at 10%………even a modest and very reasonable increase to 25% would create an additional $15,000 for every $100,000 in grant billables for Soylei. The next quarter starts in 2 weeks and we can go back 90 days on Federal contracts for billing. Have you engaged the USDA on updating Soylei’s indirect rate?
